# mobile corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === Mobile / Apple ===
# expect: Apple Pay Merchant ID
merchant.com.example.payments

# === Mobile / Google Play and Android ===
# expect: AdMob Ad Unit ID
# expect: AdMob App ID
# expect: Google Sign-In OAuth Client ID
ca-app-pub-1234567890123456/1234567890
ca-app-pub-1234567890123456~1234567890
123456-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz012345.apps.googleusercontent.com

# === Mobile / Branch.io ===
# expect: Branch.io Live Key
# expect: Branch.io Test Key
# expect: Branch.io Live Secret
# expect: Branch.io Test Secret
key_live_hkDytPACtipny3N9XmnbZlapBDdj4WIL
key_test_kkXVdpHEAPJgnMnUaQyabghcAEpwm9P3
secret_live_aB7cD8eF9gH0iJ1kL2mN3oP4qR5sT6uV
secret_test_aB7cD8eF9gH0iJ1kL2mN3oP4qR5sT6uV

# === Mobile / Attribution and push ===
# expect: OneSignal REST API Key
# expect: Kochava App GUID
# expect: Expo Push Token
# expect: Expo EAS Access Token
os_v2_app_aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
kokochavabingodemo1347526e855c56f11
ExponentPushToken[xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx]
expo_aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwXyZ0123
